title: Russia indulges in further Baltic deportation fantasies
summary_full: In highly unoriginal comments, Russian Foreign Ministry officials have said that the Baltic states are "playing with fire" by opening up their territory for "hostile actions" against Russia.
summary_public: In highly unoriginal comments, Russian Foreign Ministry officials have said that the Baltic states are "playing with fire" by opening up their territory for "hostile actions" against Russia.

RU.label: negative
RU.evidence: Russia indulges in further Baltic deportation fantasies
